response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified video structure: Intro, Guest message, Reaction, Performance. 2. Identified performance song 'Okochama Sensou' (Kid's War) via on-screen text. 3. Used search to find lyrics for 'Okochama Sensou' by Giga-P. 4. Verified performers and song metadata. 5. Mapped scenes based on content and timestamps. 6. Populated JSON with full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTuber Mizumiya hosting her birthday celebration, followed by a birthday message from Shigariko, and a group performance of the song 'Okochama Sensou'.

scenes.description: VTuber Mizumiya introduces her birthday live stream and talks to the audience about the upcoming guest portion.
Pre-recorded birthday message from Shigariko to Mizumiya.
Mizumiya reacts to the birthday message and prepares for the next segment.
A group of four VTubers, including Mizumiya and Shigariko, perform the song 'Okochama Sensou' on stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Mizumiya, Shigariko, and two other VTubers
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Verse 1]
昔々の そのまた昔
とある貴族の 仲良しな兄弟
(以下略)

[Pre-Chorus]
「ちゃんとやれ！」
じいやが呼ぶ 席につけ よーいどん！
ナイフとフォークで 応戦いたしますの
だって僕らは ブルジョアの
立派な 立派な 貴族様なんですですの
ひれふせ愚民 君との違いを
ヴァイヴァイスロイ 見せてやるぜ

[Chorus]
おい まてまて また勝手にそんな
見抜けるような ハッタリかまして
はーい はーい はい はい
お兄様の仰せのままに(笑)
あﾞーむかつくぜ！ まーじ むかつくぜ！
兄に対して 生意気な態度
閧の声 ゴングを鳴らせ

[Verse 2]
ケンカ勃発で 宣戦布告
悪戯して 悪ノリして
ほらほら 煽ってくstyleで
“大安売り” 買っちゃったら
毎度ありがとうで 君の負け！
(っしゃぁ！)

[Bridge]
拙い引き出しと
煽りあいの駆け引きでキメる
兄の威厳 見せるため 飴と飴
火花散るチる 両者の目と目
くらえ！ おれさまがルールブック
へたれじゃない ひよってない
ちょっと勇気が足りないだけ

[Pre-Chorus]
さぁさぁみなさん お手を拝借
当たり前だろ 余裕しゃくしゃく
生まれながらにしてチート
やべぇ煌めく 人生がスタート
当然です 見てみな由緒は ガチ勢
ハイ論破 ハイ論破 ハイ論破
もらってくぜ Vサイン イェイ！
はーい はーい はい はい
はなまる よくできまちた☆

[Chorus]
あﾞーむかつくぜ！ まーじ むかつくぜ！
僕に向かって 減らず口なんざ
とっておきを 君に見舞え
報復！ 制裁！ 挑発しちゃって
意地悪して 一枚上手
チャンスは貰ってく スタンスで
痛痛恨ミス！ あっちゃっちゃー
お生憎様だね 君の負け！
(Yes!)

[Outro]
だけどキミ キミだけが
ボクに似合いのライバル
オチるのも 凹んでんのも
調子狂わされるから
今宵もてめーと やいやいやいやい！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Verse 1]
Once upon a time, long, long ago
In a certain noble house, there lived a pair of inseparable siblings
(Et cetera, et cetera)

[Pre-Chorus]
"Do it properly!"
The butler calls, "Take your seats, ready, go!"
We fight with knives and forks
Because we are of the bourgeoisie
A noble, a noble, a noble lord, that's what we are
Bow down, you commoners, can't you see the difference between you and us?
Vice-viceroy, we'll show you!

[Chorus]
Hey, wait, wait, what are you doing on your own again?
Setting up some transparent bluffing
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
As you command, my lord (lol)
Ah, it's so annoying! It's really so annoying!
That insolent attitude toward your elder sibling
Sound the battle cry, ring the gong

[Verse 2]
The fight breaks out, a declaration of war
Playing pranks, egging each other on
Look, look, it's our style to keep riling things up
"Big sale," if you buy it,
Thanks as always, you lose!
(Yeah!)

[Bridge]
With my clumsy repertoire and our back-and-forth provocation, I'll clinch it
To show my elder brother's dignity, a mixture of candy and whips
Sparks flying, eyes meeting eyes
Take this! I am the rule book
I'm not a coward, I'm not chickening out
I'm just a little short on courage

[Pre-Chorus]
Come on, come on, everyone, lend us a hand
It's obvious, I'm cool, calm, and collected
Born a cheat
Oh, a sparkling life begins!
Of course! Look at my pedigree, I'm a pro!
High, rebuttal, high, rebuttal, high, rebuttal
I'm taking the V-sign, yeah!
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
Very well done!

[Chorus]
Ah, it's so annoying! It's really so annoying!
Don't you dare talk back to me
I'll show you a special treat
Retaliation, sanction, provoking me
Being mean, I'm one step ahead
Taking the chance, that's my stance
Critical miss, oops!
Too bad for you, you lose!
(Yes!)

[Outro]
But you, you're the only one
Who's a fitting rival for me
Whether I fall or get depressed
You throw me off balance
So tonight, I'll fight with you again, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah!

scenes.description: The video ends after the song performance.
